source: instrumented catboost 1.2.10 trainer (D-07/D-09), CB_INSTRUMENT_LOG; LDA reg=0.05 likelihood=true; thread_count=1
note: scatter_inner = regularized betweenMatrix (B), scatter_total = totalScatter (A), captured BEFORE ssygst_ mutates them in place. projection = trailing-rows copy of the ssyev_ output (the reduced-problem dominant eigenvector, NOT back-transformed). RE-MEASUREMENT (06.5-05): the hand-rolled f32 scatter matches B/A to <=5e-10/0, and the hand-rolled eigensolve matches BOTH f64 scipy AND f32 reference LAPACK ssygv (dominant eigenvalue 38.45, eigvec [0.597,0.563,-0.439,-0.365]); but the upstream vendored-CLAPACK ssyev_ dump reports a dominant eigenvalue (376.67) inconsistent with its own eigenvector (Rayleigh quotient 38.28) and an eigenvector 4.9e-2 away from reference. See 06.5-05-SUMMARY divergence report.
